faq.title: Questions Answered Clearly
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start — no fluff, no jargon.
faq.subLabel: Everything you need to know about CyberLabs

q1.q: Do I need prior experience to start?
q1.a: No experience required. CyberLabs is designed for all levels — our learning paths guide you from absolute beginner up to advanced penetration testing and threat analysis.

q2.q: What certifications can I prepare for?
q2.a: Our paths are aligned with CompTIA Security+, CEH, OSCP, and eJPT. Each path clearly maps to the relevant certification objectives.

q3.q: Are the labs real environments or simulations?
q3.a: Real isolated environments — not simulations. Each lab runs in a dedicated sandbox so you practice on actual tools, real CVEs, and live network traffic.

q4.a: Your dashboard shows real-time progress across all labs, paths, and courses with a detailed activity heatmap and skill radar chart.

q5.q: Is the platform legal and safe to use?
q5.a: Yes. All labs run in fully isolated sandboxes. No real-world systems are ever targeted. CyberLabs complies with international cybersecurity education standards.
